problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: If Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing is applied to in, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
